metadata.name: Programming Club
metadata.description: Professional tech community with development channels, career board, and collaboration spaces.

channels.name: 📢-announcements
channels.topic: Official club news, hackathons, and meetings
channels.initialMessage:
📢 **Club Announcements**

Stay tuned here for updates on upcoming workshops, hackathons, and general meetings!

channels.name: 👋-introductions
channels.topic: Introduce yourself and your tech stack
channels.initialMessage:
👋 **Welcome to the Club!**

Tell us your name, major, and what languages you're currently learning or using!

channels.name: 💬-general-dev
channels.topic: General programming talk and tech news
channels.initialMessage:
💬 **General Dev Chat**

Discuss the latest frameworks, tools, or news in the tech world here.

channels.name: 🆘-code-help
channels.topic: Get help with bugs and logic (No homework answers!)
channels.initialMessage:
🆘 **Need Help?**

Drop your code snippets and error logs here. Remember: we help you learn, we don't do your homework for you!

channels.name: 🚀-projects
channels.topic: Showcase your work and find collaborators
channels.initialMessage:
🚀 **Project Showcase**

Working on something cool? Share your GitHub repos or find a team for your next big idea.

channels.name: 🎯-job-board
channels.topic: Internships, full-time roles, and gig opportunities
channels.initialMessage:
💼 **Job Board**

Post or find the latest internship and job opportunities in tech.

channels.name: 📄-cv-review
channels.topic: Get feedback on your resume and portfolio
channels.initialMessage:
📄 **Resume & Portfolio Review**

Drop your CV or portfolio link for constructive feedback from peers and seniors.
